title: Chronik-Outbox terminalitätsgebunden kompaktieren
goal: Lose, taskversuchsgebundene Grabowski-Outbox-Quellen nach belegter Terminalität verlustfrei in wenige unveränderliche, hashgebundene Replay-Bundles überführen, ohne aktive Quellen zu verschieben, Receipts zur Autorität zu erheben oder den Chronik-Ledger als operative Wahrheit zu ersetzen.

acceptance.assertion: Only valid sources whose final event is agent.run.completed or agent.run.blocked, whose configurable grace period elapsed, and whose file identity remains stable may be selected; active started-only and changing sources remain loose.

Compaction requires an intact source/SHA-bound import receipt and exact presence of every source event in the actual Chronik ledger, while receipts remain explicitly nonauthoritative and reconstructible.
Bundle and manifest are immutable, canonical SHA-256-bound, fsynced, fully read back and path-safe before any loose source is removed; partial, orphaned, symlinked or corrupt artifacts fail closed.
An isolated empty-ledger and missing-receipt simulation restores all bundled events and recreates receipts from bundle evidence without source loss or divergent event-id acceptance.
Tests cover publish, directory fsync and unlink failures, source mutation before removal, duplicate and conflicting event IDs across loose and bundled sources, repeated apply and relocatable restore.
Deterministic benchmarks at live-shaped and 10000-source scale remove the eligible loose files, keep at most one full ledger scan per import and remain below the two-minute timer interval.

The exact reviewed diff passes focused and full tests, role and local smoke gates, GitHub CI, merge-bound deployment, live dry-run, controlled apply, repeated import and ledger-integrity readback with the timer restored.

rollback.trigger: Any bundle cannot replay the exact original events, an active or changed source is removed, a partial artifact is accepted, ledger integrity changes unexpectedly, or the importer exceeds the timer safety budget.
rollback.procedure: Stop compaction, retain every bundle and remaining loose source, restore the previous immutable Chronik release, reconstruct removed loose files from manifest-bound bundle byte ranges if needed, run isolated ledger replay and integrity verification, and resume the import timer only after a clean readback.

conditions: a foreign Chronik worktree, process, task or lease overlaps the selected implementation or live outbox path
the live dry-run reports active, invalid, receiptless, stale-receipt or ledger-unconfirmed sources as eligible
bundle or manifest durability cannot be established before source removal
the empty-ledger recovery simulation or exact event-id/payload comparison fails
the controlled live apply would require deleting a source younger than the approved grace period
